connections.def: from 2784; a proclamation (especially of the gospel; by implication, the gospel itself):--preaching. see GREEK for
of uncertain affinity; to herald (as a public crier), especially divine truth (the gospel):--preacher(-er), proclaim,

connections.gloss: declare, bring (declare, show) glad (good) tidings, preach (the gospel)
connections.def: from 2095 and 32; to announce good news ("evangelize") especially the gospel:--declare, bring (declare, show) glad (good) tidings, preach (the gospel). see GREEK for 2095 see GREEK for
